BaselineCodecError.docs: T008: deleted. Old baseline codec error for the TypeBaseline-based evaluator. Replaced by BaselineRustdocCodecError.

BaselineRustdocCodec.docs: Codec struct that loads rustdoc_types::Crate JSON from the filesystem (Baseline B or Current C).

BaselineRustdocCodecError.docs: Error type for loading rustdoc_types::Crate JSON as Baseline (B) or Current (C). thiserror #[from] generates From<serde_json::Error> and From<io::Error>; declared here without generic args (core::convert::From) so the signal evaluator covers them via generic-args-stripped fallback.

CatalogueDocumentCodecError.docs: Error type for the new CatalogueDocument serde codec. Replaces TypeCatalogueCodecError. thiserror #[from] generates From<serde_json::Error> and From<io::Error>; declared here without generic args (core::convert::From) so the signal evaluator covers them via generic-args-stripped fallback.

CatalogueDocumentCodec.docs: Stateless codec struct that encodes/decodes CatalogueDocument to/from JSON (schema_version=3). Methods: new (constructor), decode (json+stem → CatalogueDocument), load (path → CatalogueDocument), encode (CatalogueDocument → JSON). All methods are static (no receiver).

CatalogueToExtendedCrateCodec.docs: Codec struct that converts CatalogueDocument into ExtendedCrate (TypeGraph A).

CatalogueToExtendedCrateCodecError.docs: Error type for the Catalogue -> ExtendedCrate (TypeGraph A) codec.

EvaluateSignalsError.docs: Existing error type for the execute_type_signals_for_layer infrastructure function (the new T008 entry point replacing the deleted evaluate_and_write_signals). The old evaluate_and_write_signals/validate_action_diagnostics/validate_and_write_catalogue functions are deleted; execute_type_signals_for_layer is the active caller.

FsCatalogueLoader.docs: IN-21/IN-22: modified. FsCatalogueLoader now loads v3 CatalogueDocument natively via CatalogueDocumentCodec (v3-native). The previous v3_doc_to_stub conversion step (infrastructure::tddd::v3_stub) is deleted per IN-21. The CatalogueLoader port return type is updated to BTreeMap<LayerId, CatalogueDocument> per IN-22. Non-v3 catalogues are treated as fail-closed errors.

FsCatalogueSpecSignalsStore.docs: Existing FsCatalogueSpecSignalsStore. Referenced — not modified in this track.

InMemoryCatalogueLinter.docs: IN-22 (T025): modified. T025 changes the domain CatalogueLinter::run port signature from catalogue: &TypeCatalogueDocument to catalogue: &CatalogueDocument (v3-native). This adapter's run() implementation must be updated in the same T025 commit to accept &CatalogueDocument and traverse v3 CatalogueDocument entries instead of TypeCatalogueDocument entries. The inherent new() and with_disabled_rules() constructors are unchanged.

EdgeSet.docs: T008: deleted (previously a stub). Was an edge set for type_graph_render which was removed when TypeGraph was deleted.

RustdocSchemaExporter.docs: T008: modified. RustdocSchemaExporter is now also the 'C' producer for the new 3-way evaluator. Trait impl surface changed from baseline snapshot.

SchemaExportCodecError.docs: Existing error type for the SchemaExport -> TypeGraph codec. Referenced for continuity.

SignalEvaluatorV2.docs: Phase 1 + Phase 2 signal evaluator struct. Stateless struct driving the 2-phase algorithm.

FsCatalogueDocumentLoader.docs: Stateless filesystem adapter implementing CatalogueDocumentLoaderPort. Delegates to CatalogueDocumentCodec::load and maps codec errors to CatalogueDocumentLoaderError variants. Injected into CatalogueImplSignalsInteractor at the apps/cli composition root. [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D2]

RustdocCrateAdapter.docs: Adapter implementing RustdocCratePort. load_from_path wraps BaselineRustdocCodec::load (B-side baseline). capture_current wraps RustdocSchemaExporter::export_rustdoc_json_path + BaselineRustdocCodec::from_json (C-side live capture). workspace_root is passed to RustdocSchemaExporter::new. Injected into CatalogueImplSignalsInteractor at the apps/cli composition root. [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D2]

FsTdddLayerBindingsAdapter.docs: Stateless filesystem adapter implementing TdddLayerBindingsPort. Wraps load_tddd_layers_from_path (infrastructure::verify::tddd_layers) and maps infra TdddLayerBinding to domain TdddLayerBinding entries. Injected into CatalogueImplSignalsInteractor at the apps/cli composition root. [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D2]

ClusterPlan.docs: T008: deleted. Was a clustering plan struct in type_graph_cluster, removed with TypeGraph.

CrossEdge.docs: T008: deleted. Was a cross-cluster edge in type_graph_cluster, removed with TypeGraph.

SignalSummary.docs: T008: deleted. Was a summary type produced by the old TypeBaseline-based signal evaluator.

TypeGraphExportError.docs: T008: deleted. Was the error type for type_graph_export functions. Removed with TypeGraph.

TypeGraphRenderOptions.docs: T008: deleted. Was the options struct for type_graph_render functions. Removed with TypeGraph.

CaptureBaselineError.docs: Newtype error returned by capture_rustdoc_baseline_for_layer and force_capture_rustdoc_baseline_for_layer so the CLI can map to CliError::Message. Pre-existing type, referenced for free-function return type resolution.

TypeCatalogueCodecError.docs: Deleted in T027/IN-21 — v1/v2 legacy codec error for TypeCatalogueDocument (infrastructure::tddd::catalogue_codec). The entire catalogue_codec module was deleted per IN-21. Replaced by CatalogueDocumentCodecError.

GitShowTrackBlobReader.docs: T021 DONE / T022 DONE / T024 DONE. Adapter implementing TrackBlobReader and SpecElementHashReader via git-show on the local repository. Only the inherent new() constructor is declared in methods; TrackBlobReader and SpecElementHashReader trait methods are not listed here because the structural equality check for impl blocks (ItemEnum::Impl) only compares the for_, trait_, and generics fields — not the method bodies. The signal evaluator's items_structurally_equal for Impl items intentionally omits method comparison per ADR D9. Adding trait impl methods here would be treated as inherent methods and cause structural mismatches against the C-side. T021: read_type_signals implemented. T022: read_type_catalogue returns (Vec<u8>, String). T024: read_catalogue_for_spec_ref_check returns (CatalogueDocument, String) via CatalogueDocumentCodec::decode.

LoadAllCataloguesError.docs: Deleted in T027/IN-21 — the v1/v2 load_all_catalogues path was removed entirely; FsCatalogueLoader now uses load_all_catalogues_native / LoadAllCataloguesNativeError instead. The V3StubConversion variant was never added (deleted before implementation).

LoadAllCataloguesNativeError.docs: T025: added. v3-native counterpart to LoadAllCataloguesError. No V3StubConversion variant (fail-closed per CN-11). thiserror #[from] generates From<LoadTdddLayersError>.

FsSymlinkGuard.docs: Filesystem-backed implementation of SymlinkGuardPort. reject_symlinks_from_root walks all ancestors (root to leaf) checking each with symlink_metadata. reject_symlinks_below delegates to infrastructure::track::symlink_guard::reject_symlinks_below and maps the result to SymlinkGuardError variants. Injected into CatalogueImplSignalsInteractor at the apps/cli composition root. The proper-layering realization that IN-18 mandates (hexagonal purity: no raw std::fs I/O in the usecase layer); surfaced by a Codex PR-review finding. [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D2]

infrastructure::tddd::catalogue_codec::d.docs: Deleted in T027/IN-21 — v1/v2 legacy free function decoding a JSON string into TypeCatalogueDocument (schema_version=2). The entire infrastructure::tddd::catalogue_codec module was deleted per IN-21. Replaced by CatalogueDocumentCodec::decode.

infrastructure::tddd::catalogue_codec::e.docs: Deleted in T027/IN-21 — v1/v2 legacy free function encoding a TypeCatalogueDocument to a JSON string (schema_version=2). The entire infrastructure::tddd::catalogue_codec module was deleted per IN-21. Replaced by CatalogueDocumentCodec::encode.

infrastructure::tddd::catalogue_spec_sig.docs: T026/IN-26: modified. v3-only, fail-closed (CN-11): the UnsupportedSchemaVersion arm and v2 catalogue_codec fallback are removed. Any CatalogueDocumentCodec decode error — including a non-v3 schema_version — propagates immediately as an error string. No v2 fallback attempted.

infrastructure::tddd::baseline_capture::.docs: Captures the current rustdoc_types::Crate JSON as the baseline (B) for a layer. New in T008 replacing the old capture_baseline_for_layer.
Force-captures the current rustdoc_types::Crate JSON as the baseline, overwriting any existing baseline. New in T008.

infrastructure::code_profile_builder::bu.docs: T008: deleted. Built a TypeGraph from SchemaExport. Replaced by SignalEvaluatorV2 which operates on rustdoc_types::Crate directly.

infrastructure::tddd::baseline_builder::.docs: T008: deleted. Built a TypeBaseline from TypeGraph. Replaced by capture_rustdoc_baseline_for_layer.

infrastructure::tddd::baseline_capture::.docs: T008: deleted. Old capture function using TypeBaseline. Replaced by capture_rustdoc_baseline_for_layer.

infrastructure::tddd::baseline_codec::de.docs: T008: deleted. Decoded JSON to TypeBaseline. Replaced by BaselineRustdocCodec::load.

infrastructure::tddd::baseline_codec::en.docs: T008: deleted. Encoded TypeBaseline to JSON. Replaced by BaselineRustdocCodec (which uses serde directly on rustdoc_types::Crate).

infrastructure::tddd::type_graph_cluster.docs: T008: deleted. Classified types in a TypeGraph into clusters. Removed with TypeGraph.

infrastructure::tddd::type_graph_export:.docs: T008: deleted. Exported TypeGraph for a layer. Removed with TypeGraph.

infrastructure::tddd::type_graph_render:.docs: T008: deleted. Rendered TypeGraph as clustered Mermaid diagram. Removed with TypeGraph.
T008: deleted. Rendered TypeGraph as flat Mermaid diagram. Removed with TypeGraph.
T008: deleted. Rendered TypeGraph overview as Mermaid. Removed with TypeGraph.
T008: deleted. Wrote TypeGraph render output to a directory. Removed with TypeGraph.
T008: deleted. Wrote TypeGraph render output to a file. Removed with TypeGraph.

infrastructure::tddd::type_signals_evalu.docs: T008: deleted. Old signal evaluation entry point using TypeBaseline + TypeGraph. Replaced by the new bin/sotp track catalogue-impl-signals pipeline via SignalEvaluatorV2.
T008: deleted. Old validation helper for action diagnostics in the TypeBaseline-based evaluator.
T008: deleted. Old validation-and-write helper in the TypeBaseline-based evaluator.

infrastructure::verify::spec_states::ver.docs: T022 DONE / T023 DONE: modified. Verifies spec.json Stage 1 signals and per-layer Stage 2 domain type signals. Actual signature: pub fn verify_from_spec_json(spec_json_path: &Path, strict: bool, trusted_root: &Path) -> VerifyOutcome. Stage 2 was rewired from catalogue_codec::decode + v3_doc_to_stub (TypeCatalogueDocument path) to type_signals_codec::decode + check_type_signals(&TypeSignalsDocument, strict) + catalogue byte-hash freshness check. Path is std::path::Path (L1 short-name: Path). VerifyOutcome is domain::verify::VerifyOutcome (L1 short-name: VerifyOutcome). Both are external types; the signal evaluator uses format_type_with_canon (rsplit on '::' → last segment) so 'Path' and 'VerifyOutcome' will match the C-side rustdoc representation directly.

infrastructure::tddd::type_signals_evalu.docs: T026/IN-25: modified. The kind_tag derivation is now self-contained: data_role_kind_tag / contract_role_kind_tag / function_role_kind_tag derive kind_tag strings directly from v3 entry role and kind fields. No reference to v3_doc_to_stub remains. Function signature is unchanged.

infrastructure::verify::spec_code_consis.docs: IN-17 / D1: retire the stub for `bin/sotp verify spec-code-consistency`. The stub was a T008 placeholder that always returned an error explaining the command was removed. The command itself (and this stub) are deleted as part of the catalogue-impl-signals introduction. The module libs/infrastructure/src/verify/spec_code_consistency.rs will be removed entirely. [source: ADR 2026-05-11-2330 D1]
T008: deleted. Converted ConsistencyReport to VerifyFinding list. Removed with check_consistency.
T008: deleted. Ran check_consistency from component inputs. Removed with TypeGraph/TypeBaseline.

infrastructure::tddd::catalogue_bulk_loa.docs: Deleted in T027/IN-21 — the v1/v2 bulk-loader free function that loaded TypeCatalogueDocument per layer. Replaced by load_all_catalogues_native (v3-native, uses CatalogueDocumentCodec). The LoadAllCataloguesError type was deleted together with this function.
T025: added. v3-native counterpart to load_all_catalogues. Uses CatalogueDocumentCodec::decode directly; rejects non-v3 catalogues fail-closed (CN-11). Used by FsCatalogueLoader after T025.

infrastructure::type_catalogue_render::r.docs: Deleted in T027/IN-21 — the v1/v2 render_type_catalogue function was removed when the v2 catalogue path was eliminated. Replaced by render_type_catalogue_v3 for v3 CatalogueDocument rendering.

T025: added. v3-native renderer that converts CatalogueDocument into a Markdown table for <layer>-types.md. Groups entries by their v3 role using V3_EXTRA_SECTIONS (Entity, AggregateRoot, Specification, SpecificationPort, UseCaseFunction) in addition to the standard sections. Replaces the v2 render_type_catalogue path for v3 catalogues. Both the Signal column (via type_signals) and the Cat-Spec column (via catalogue_spec_signals, positional with type_name cross-check) are active.
